methodology.allergens: Allergens re-tagged 2026-04-24 using strict 'essential only' rule: flag ONLY when an ingredient is unambiguously an allergen source. Dairy: milk/butter/cream/cheese/yogurt/labneh/ranch/sour cream/ghee. Eggs: egg/mayo/aioli/hollandaise. Gluten: bread/flour/bun/bagel/wrap/pita/wheat/pasta/oats/panko/breadcrumbs/soy sauce/gochujang (NOT corn tortilla, hashbrowns, chicken sausage, falafel). Soya: soy sauce/tofu/edamame/gochujang/miso/Biscoff (soy lecithin). Sesame: sesame seeds/tahini/za'atar (NOT dukkah). Fish: salmon/tuna/cod/anchovy (NOT Worcestershire trace). Crustaceans: shrimp/prawn/crab/lobster. Molluscs: mussel/clam/oyster/squid/octopus. Nuts: explicit tree nut/Nutella/almond butter (NOT dukkah). Peanuts: peanut/peanut butter. Sulphites: wine/explicit sulphite-preserved/dried fruit (NOT pickles, capers, balsamic). Mustard/Celery/Lupin/Lentils: explicit. Sugared drink: sugary Coke/Sprite/Fanta only. Empty set -> ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
methodology.calories: Estimated from ingredient quantities using USDA/standard food composition per-100g values. Wastage not applied. Rounded to nearest integer. Estimates only — verify with lab testing for regulatory labeling.
methodology.wastage_pct: wastage_pct is stored as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.05 = 5%); null means no wastage value available

changelog.change: Dial-back allergen re-tag: applied strict 'essential only' rule across all recipes. Removed conservative/trace tags (Worcestershire->Fish, dukkah->Sesame/Nuts, pickles/capers/balsamic->Sulphites). Biscoff recipes retain Soya (soy lecithin essential). Empty allergen sets now tagged ['NO_ALLERGENS'].

Re-tagged allergens across all 47 recipes using standardized 16-tag vocabulary (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Replaced Soybeans label with Soya on Lotus Biscoff Pancake (#27) and Biscoff Sauce (#40). Removed non-applicable Sulphites tags (pickles, capers, balsamic are not sulphite-preserved in new taxonomy).

changelog.entry: Moved bagels (#15 Plain, #16/17/18 Sesame) from packaging[] to ingredients[].
Added Gluten to allergens for all 4 bagel recipes; added Sesame Seeds for sesame bagels (#16, #17, #18).
Recomputed calories for bagels: +250 kcal for plain/sesame bagel base (#15, #16, #17, #18).
Added new recipe #48 'Berry Blast Acai Bowl' (AÇAÍ BOWLS, AED 68 menu line) with BOM built from menu description.
Added pending_decisions array flagging 6 items for user review (no changes applied).
Scanned all 47 pre-existing recipes for food items in packaging[]; flagged 6 non-bagel cases (strawberries in #23, #28, #29, #43, #44, #46) — left unchanged per scope rules.
Updated recipe_count to 48 and set last_updated to 2026-04-22.
Merged Smoked Salmon Toast SKU — kept Chilled 80g as canonical, deleted Frozen 50g variant per operator decision 2026-04-22
Added Soybeans to allergens for Lotus Biscoff Pancake and Biscoff Sauce — commercial Lotus Biscoff contains soy (2026-04-22)

Menu descriptions rewritten to match recipe BOM as source of truth; stripped unsubstantiated brand-DNA claims (wild-caught, free-range, organic, heritage, sustainable) and limited "artisan" to in-house preparations per Phase 2 audit (2026-04-22)
Renamed "Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey)" to "Maple Syrup" across all recipes (2026-04-22)
Resolved all slashed ingredients to single SKUs per Phase 2 costing prep (2026-04-22)
Rebuilt Levantine Shakshuka (#10) tomato base — split 50g combined into 15g Tomato Paste (Anna) + 120g Peeled Tomato (canned, crushed); kcal recomputed (2026-04-22)

Operator confirmed procurement reality: standard smoked salmon (no wild-caught claim), standard eggs (no free-range claim), bagel type is customer modifier. Generalized bagel ingredient names, applied conservative Gluten+Sesame allergen declaration, cleared related pending decisions.
